title: Metabase H2 connection string injection allowing INIT-based RCE
description: connection-details->spec runs an admin-supplied H2 :db string through connection-string-set-safe-options, which only strips an exact case-insensitive 'init' key from a naive ';'-split parse. Because the H2 ConnectionInfo parser accepts options in alternate forms that this routine does not normalize, attacker-controlled INIT clauses can survive into the spec and execute arbitrary SQL/Java on connection (H2 INIT runs SQL, and H2 SQL can load Java code via CREATE ALIAS / custom functions, yielding RCE).
